# VibeXForge PH Launch — agent-generated launch material

**Generated by**: marketing-agent v0.6.0 in template mode (no LLM key set)
**Generated**: 2026-04-29 (when PH was still scheduled for 5/1; dates updated 2026-05-01 after PH shift to 5/4)
**PH date**: 2026-05-04 (Monday — better PH algorithm; shifted from original 5/1)
**Show HN**: deferred to 2026-05-14 (PH+10) per brain

## Files

- `launch_plan_vibexforge_20260429.md` — 30-day playbook with PH-relative timing
- `drafts/pending/*.md` — **template-mode** per-platform drafts (auto-generated, generic)
- `polished/*.md` — **human-polished** versions referencing real VibeX features (use these)

| Platform | File | Quality (template mode) | Action needed |

| Dev.to | `*-vibexforge-dev_to.md` | 🟡 Markdown skeleton | **Replace with full ~800-word post-mortem** before PH+5 |

## What template mode can't do well

Template mode produces structurally-correct posts. It can't write **launch-day energy** — that requires either:
- LLM mode (renew `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` → re-run the generate command, no other change needed) — produces 3-5x better launch copy
- Manual polish (you, in the next 24h)

Recommended path: **renew the Anthropic key, re-run with `--mode llm --variants 3`**. The bandit + critic + reflexion stack will pick the best variant per platform.

## Manual checks needed before posting

- [ ] No `github.com/alex-jb/vibex` link anywhere (repo is private)
- [ ] All links point to `vibexforge.com` only
- [ ] Match the brain's "color restraint" rule — no hype words, no "revolutionary"
- [ ] Match the bilingual rule — if posting on 即刻 / 小红书 / V2EX, generate Chinese versions separately (not auto-translate)

## How to approve a draft for posting

When you're ready to post one:

```bash
cd ~/Desktop/orallexa-marketing-agent
mv docs/vibex-launch/drafts/pending/<file>.md queue/approved/<file>.md
git add queue/approved && git commit -m "approve: VibeX PH launch — <platform>"
git push
# publish.yml triggers; posts to the platform if secrets configured.
```

(Or open the file in any editor, copy the body, paste manually into X/Bluesky/etc.
For PH launch where every word matters, manual paste is probably safer than auto-post.)
